lines: Wowe, Mana, ndaguhimbaza Kukw ari nta yindi man’ibaho;Nguhaye n'umutima wanjye Ump' imbaraga z'Umwuka wawe, Mbashe gukor' ibikunezeza, Mw izina ry'Umwami wacu Yesu.
Nuzuzw’Umwuka wawe wera, Umutima wanjy' uwutegeke;Ujy'unyobor inzira
yawe, Ngo nyinyuremo ntajya nzimira; Kandi, ni nanirw' ujy'untabara, Ugez’ubw’uzansohoz’i Wawe.
